narrative:
Maineville Village (precinct in Warren County) has 776 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
